mapper.select: /* * lot(product_dtl_id)별 재고 — 매출/폐기는 찍힌 lot에서 직접 차감, * lot이 없는 특가/공구 + 초과판매 넘침분만 활성 lot에 oldest-first 분배. * - 상세 합계 = v_product_stock(요약)과 일치 * - 만료 lot 은 판매불가 → CUR_STOCK_QTY = 0 (행은 노출, 잔여는 ORG_STOCK_QTY로 확인) */ WITH ACT AS ( SELECT PD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, PD.PRODUCT_ID, PD.LOCATION_ID, PD.ORG_STOCK_QTY AS ORG, COALESCE(PD.EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE'9999-12-31') AS EXP_KEY, PD.RECEIVED_DATE AS RCV FROM product_dtl PD WHERE PD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND (PD.EXPIRATION_DATE IS NULL OR PD.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE()) ), SQ AS ( SELECT SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, SUM(SD.QTY) AS Q FROM sales_dtl SD JOIN sales_mst SM ON SM.SALES_ID = SD.SALES_ID WHERE SD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' GROUP BY SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), DQ AS ( SELECT DD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, SUM(DD.QTY) AS Q FROM disposal_dtl DD WHERE DD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY DD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), SP AS ( SELECT SM.LOCATION_ID, SUM(IFNULL(SPD.REMAIN_QTY, SPD.QTY)) + IFNULL(SUM(SR.RESERVATION_CNT),0) AS Q FROM special_dtl SPD JOIN special_mst SM ON SPD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID, SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_CNT) AS RESERVATION_CNT FROM special_rsv_mst SRM JOIN special_rsv_dtl SRD ON SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = SRD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID WHERE SRM.SALES_ID IS NULL AND SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' GROUP BY SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID ) SR ON SPD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SR.SPECIAL_DTL_ID WHERE SM.PROGRESS_TYPE IN ('START','READY') AND SPD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY SM.LOCATION_ID ), GB AS ( SELECT G.LOCATION_ID, SUM(J.TOTAL_QTY) AS Q FROM groupbuy_join_mst J JOIN groupbuy_mst G ON G.GROUPBUY_ID = J.GROUPBUY_ID WHERE J.JOIN_STATUS = 'JOIN' AND G.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY G.LOCATION_ID ), /* 매출+폐기를 찍힌 lot에서 직접 차감 (lot별) */ DIRECT AS ( SELECT A.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, A.LOCATION_ID, A.ORG, A.EXP_KEY, A.RCV, IFNULL(SQ.Q,0) + IFNULL(DQ.Q,0) AS LOT_DED FROM ACT A LEFT JOIN SQ ON SQ.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = A.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN DQ ON DQ.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = A.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ), /* 직접차감 후 잔여(>=0)와 초과판매 넘침분(lot ORG 초과분) */ AFTER_DIRECT AS ( SELECT D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, D.LOCATION_ID, D.ORG, D.EXP_KEY, D.RCV, GREATEST(0, D.ORG - D.LOT_DED) AS REMAIN, GREATEST(0, D.LOT_DED - D.ORG) AS OVERFLOW FROM DIRECT D ), /* lot 귀속이 없는 차감(특가+공구) + 넘침분 = 위치 단위 잔여차감 */ LOC_REM AS ( SELECT AD.LOCATION_ID, MAX(IFNULL(SP.Q,0)) + MAX(IFNULL(GB.Q,0)) + SUM(AD.OVERFLOW) AS REM_DED FROM AFTER_DIRECT AD LEFT JOIN SP ON SP.LOCATION_ID = AD.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN GB ON GB.LOCATION_ID = AD.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY AD.LOCATION_ID ), /* 위치 잔여차감을 '직접차감 후 잔여'에 oldest-first 분배 */ FIFO AS ( SELECT AD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID, AD.LOCATION_ID, AD.REMAIN, LR.REM_DED, COALESCE(SUM(AD.REMAIN) OVER ( PARTITION BY AD.LOCATION_ID ORDER BY AD.EXP_KEY, AD.RCV, AD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING), 0) AS CUM_BEFORE FROM AFTER_DIRECT AD JOIN LOC_REM LR ON LR.LOCATION_ID = AD.LOCATION_ID ), CALC AS ( SELECT PRODUCT_DTL_ID, REMAIN - GREATEST(0, LEAST(REMAIN, REM_DED - CUM_BEFORE)) AS CUR FROM FIFO ) SELECT D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , D.LOCATION_ID , D.STATUS , SPM.PARTNER_NM , SLM.LOCATION_NM , CM.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , D.LOT_NO , P.P_PRODUCT_CD , P.P_VARCODE_NO , DATE_FORMAT(D.RECEIVED_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RECEIVED_DATE , D.BOX_QTY , D.ORG_STOCK_QTY , IFNULL(C.CUR, 0) AS CUR_STOCK_QTY , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIRATION_DATE , D.COST_PRICE , P.ORG_SALES_PRICE ORG_PRICE , D.SALES_PRICE , D.AGREED_PRICE , D.VARCODE_NO , D.DESCRIPTION , 'N' EDITOR , D.ETC_PRICE , (SELECT MAX(NAME) NAME FROM user_mst WHERE USER_ID = (CASE WHEN D.UPDATE_USER IS NOT NULL THEN D.UPDATE_USER ELSE D.CREATE_USER END) ) UPDATE_USER , CASE WHEN D.UPDATE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(D.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(D.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') END UPDATE_DATE FROM product_dtl D JOIN product_mst P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN CALC C ON C.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst SLM ON SLM.LOCATION_ID = D.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst SPM ON SPM.PARTNER_ID = P.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst CM ON CM.CATEGORY_ID = P.CATEGORY_ID WHERE D.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY D.LOT_NO DESC

SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , P.STATUS , SLM.LOCATION_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.P_PRODUCT_CD /* 계열사 상품 코드 */ , P.P_VARCODE_NO /* 계열사 상품 코드 88코드 */ , P.STATUS , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') EXPIRATION_DATE , MAX(P.ORG_SALES_PRICE) ORG_SALES_PRICE /* 권장 소비자가 */ , P.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(SUM(D.BOX_QTY), 0) AS BOX_QTY , IFNULL(SUM(D.ORG_STOCK_QTY), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0) AS CUR_STOCK_QTY , IFNULL(SUM(D.ORG_STOCK_QTY), 0) AS ORG_STOCK_QTY , C.CATEGORY_NM AS CATEGORY_NM , S.PARTNER_NM AS PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(MIN(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS FIRST_RECEIVED_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LAST_RECEIVED_DATE , 'N' EDITOR FROM product_mst P LEFT JOIN product_dtl D ON P.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst SLM ON SLM.LOCATION_ID = D.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst S ON P.PARTNER_ID = S.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SM.STORE_ID , SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID , sum(SD.QTY ) QTY FROM sales_mst SM LEFT JOIN sales_dtl SD ON SM.SALES_ID = SD.SALES_ID WHERE SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' group by SM.STORE_ID , SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID ) SD ON D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID AND P.PRODUCT_ID = SD.PRODUCT_ID AND P.STORE_ID = SD.STORE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND P.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND C.CATEGORY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryNm}, '%')
AND P.PRODUCT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productNm}, '%')
AND D.RECEIVED_DATE >= #{receivedDateFrom}
AND D.RECEIVED_DATE <= #{receivedDateTo}
AND P.P_VARCODE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pvarcodeNo},'%')
GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.P_PRODUCT_CD /* 계열사 상품 코드 88코드 */ , P.P_VARCODE_NO /* 계열사 상품 바코드 */ , P.STATUS , SLM.LOCATION_NM , P.DESCRIPTION , C.CATEGORY_NM , S.PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') HAVING 1=1
AND SUM(D.CUR_STOCK_QTY) > 0
AND NVL(SUM(D.CUR_STOCK_QTY),0) <= 0
ORDER BY P.CREATE_DATE DESC , (CASE WHEN MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC , C.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM ASC , LAST_RECEIVED_DATE DESC

SELECT V.PRODUCT_ID , PM.STORE_ID , PM.CATEGORY_ID , PM.PARTNER_ID , PM.STATUS , V.LOCATION_NM , PM.PRODUCT_NM , PM.P_PRODUCT_CD , PM.P_VARCODE_NO , PM.STATUS , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIRATION_DATE , MAX(PM.ORG_SALES_PRICE) AS ORG_SALES_PRICE , PM.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(SUM(D.BOX_QTY), 0) AS BOX_QTY , V.CUR_STOCK_QTY , V.ORG_STOCK_QTY , V.CATEGORY_NM , V.PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(MIN(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS FIRST_RECEIVED_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LAST_RECEIVED_DATE , 'N' AS EDITOR
FROM v_product_stock V JOIN product_mst PM ON V.PRODUCT_ID = PM.PRODUCT_ID
LEFT JOIN product_dtl D ON PM.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID AND V.LOCATION_ID = D.LOCATION_ID AND (D.EXPIRATION_DATE IS NULL OR D.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE())
WHERE 1=1
AND PM.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND V.CATEGORY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryNm}, '%')
AND PM.PRODUCT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productNm}, '%')
AND (D.RECEIVED_DATE IS NULL OR D.RECEIVED_DATE >= #{receivedDateFrom})
AND (D.RECEIVED_DATE IS NULL OR D.RECEIVED_DATE <= #{receivedDateTo})
AND V.P_VARCODE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pvarcodeNo},'%')
GROUP BY V.PRODUCT_ID , PM.STORE_ID , PM.CATEGORY_ID , PM.PARTNER_ID , PM.PRODUCT_NM , PM.P_PRODUCT_CD , PM.P_VARCODE_NO , PM.STATUS , V.LOCATION_NM , PM.DESCRIPTION , V.CATEGORY_NM , V.PARTNER_NM , V.CUR_STOCK_QTY , V.ORG_STOCK_QTY , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d')
HAVING 1=1
AND V.CUR_STOCK_QTY > 0
AND IFNULL(V.CUR_STOCK_QTY,0) <= 0
ORDER BY PM.CREATE_DATE DESC , (CASE WHEN MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC , V.CATEGORY_NM , PM.PRODUCT_NM ASC , LAST_RECEIVED_DATE DESC

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.NAME , U.PHONE , U.GENDER , U.AGE_RANGE , U.ADDRESS , U.BIRTHDAY , CONCAT( TIMESTAMPDIFF( YEAR, STR_TO_DATE( REPLACE(U.BIRTHDAY, '-', ''), -- 하이픈 있으면 제거 '%Y%m%d' ), CURDATE() ), '세') AS AGE , DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') CREATE_DATE , COALESCE(SUM(S.TOTAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_PRICE FROM user_mst U LEFT JOIN sales_mst S ON U.USER_ID = S.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND ( U.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') OR U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') OR U.PHONE LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') )
GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.NAME , U.PHONE , U.GENDER , U.AGE_RANGE , U.ADDRESS , DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') DESC
